description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, with three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that uses a before_script to run docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, then executes docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test job that runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE followed by docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE npm run test. In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch and runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE.
